title: About the Project
tagline: Real compatibility data for freshwater and marine aquariums
story.p1: Aqua360 was born to prevent common fishkeeping mistakes. You know when someone puts beautiful species together in the same tank and then predation, stress, or incompatibility issues show up? I've seen people stock Neon Tetras with Angelfish and watch the Neons vanish one by one. The whole idea is to help aquarists make better choices for their flora and fauna, building a healthier and more harmonious environment.
story.p2: With Aqua360, you can check compatibility between fish, plants, and other aquatic organisms, factoring in predation risks, behavior, and water parameters. Over 788 species are cataloged with scientific data from sources like GBIF, WoRMS, and iNaturalist.
story.p3: All of this with no ads and no product placement -- just useful information to support better decisions in the hobby. The project is independently maintained by a developer passionate about technology and fishkeeping.
feature.compatibility.desc: Check whether your species can coexist, with predation, behavior, and parameter analysis.
feature.catalog.desc: 707 freshwater fish, saltwater fish, and invertebrates with detailed scientific data.
feature.plants.desc: 148 species with lighting, CO2, difficulty, and placement information.
feature.corals.desc: 37 marine species with photos, parameters, and difficulty level.
feature.calculators.desc: 10 tools for volume, filtration, substrate, heater sizing, and more.
feature.guides.desc: Step-by-step guides for community, planted, cichlid, and marine tanks.
principle.noAds.desc: No ads, no banners, no pop-ups. Aqua360 is 100% focused on useful information.
principle.transparent.desc: We don't sell products and have no commercial partnerships. Recommendations are based solely on scientific data.
principle.community.desc: An independent, free project maintained with dedication to help aquarists make better decisions.
tech.desc: Built with modern technologies and scientific data from globally recognized institutions.
